channel.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
channel.description:
Yesterday I was working with @SantosGuillamot and @Reyes in a plan of what we need to achieve to release a first version of the Frontity.org site to the world :)
Feel free to edit this post when you finish something.
## Roadmap
* **Web - frontity.org** * :white_check_mark: - Prepare wireframes in Sketch. * :white_check_mark: - Write website copy. * :white_check_mark: - Choose Newsletter Saas. * :white_check_mark: - Prepare newsletter submission (two screens). * :white_check_mark: - Prepare extensive feedback survey (typeform). * :white_check_mark: - Turn wireframes into website layout. * :white_check_mark: - Configure footer pages. * :white_check_mark: - Configure analytics. * :white_check_mark: - Redirect frontity.com to frontity.org. * **Forum** * :white_check_mark: - Choose Single Sign On solution. * :white_check_mark: - Configure categories (names, descriptions and about topics). * :x: - Define forum groups. * :x: - Display the current objectives of each category. * :white_check_mark: - Create micro-updates threads for every team. * :white_check_mark: - Menu with links a frontity.org, GitHub and Twitter. * :white_check_mark: - Welcome message (which can be closed). * :white_check_mark: - Configure GDPR & cookies. * :white_check_mark: - Configure sign up (add checkbox GDPR and connect to newsletter). * :white_check_mark: - Create pages with legal stuff. * :white_check_mark: - Create forum analytics. * **Frontity Blog** * :white_check_mark: - Change blog.frontity.com domain to blog.frontity.org and redirect the URLs. * :white_check_mark: - Remove Sumo. * :white_check_mark: - Review all blog's content and reorganize it. * :white_check_mark: - Configure blog Analytics. * **Plugin** * :white_check_mark: - Add a warning message at the top of the readme.txt and dashboard. * :white_check_mark: - Remove all links pointing to frontity.com (instademo, get-help…). * :white_check_mark: - Add UTM campaigns to all relevant links pointing to frontity.org. * :white_check_mark: - Update readme.txt on Github (commit). * :white_check_mark: - Upload new version of the old plugin (wp-pwa). * **Extra** * :white_check_mark: - Update Twitter profile. * :white_check_mark: - Update Linkedin profile. * :white_check_mark: - Move support.frontity.com to support.wp-pwa.com and redirect URLs. * :white_check_mark: - Delete business model from docs.

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
I have been working these days testing and integrating the newsletter saas and it is almost finished, so I hope we can end it today. It seems to be great

I have been also improving aspects of the forum like the menu and I’ll keep going on this.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
I was adding styles and final texts to the frontity.org newsletter form. Today I’m going to make that form GDPR compliant.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Yesterday I finished the extensive user survey. Today I will be working on how we can distribute the user survey and the pre-launch strategy on social media.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I’m going to migrate our blog to blog.frontity.org.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
The first version of frontity.org is almost ready, so I’ll keep working on this. If possible, I’ll work on preparing the forum too.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Morning! I’ll be working on the newsletter form today. We are almost ready to launch the first version of frontity.org!

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Yesterday we couldn’t launch the new web, so I will keep working on that. We can follow the progress in this topic:
Pre-launch Roadmap

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Today I’ll be working on writing the website copy. I talked to Gabriel yesterday about the user interviews and, hopefully, I’ll be able to have a first version of the feedback survey too.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Today I will continue working on the website. I think we can launch the first version of it

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Reyes:

Yesterday I worked with @SantosGuillamot to organize all tasks of Frontity’s pre-launch. We have decided to go with one board on Trello for our to-do lists.

Yesterday I was working on this and today I will try to make as much progress as possible designing frontity.org website in Webflow.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Yesterday I worked with @SantosGuillamot to organize all tasks of Frontity’s pre-launch. We have decided to go with one board on Trello for our to-do lists. There’s plenty of work ahead Today I’ll keep working on preparing the extensive feedback survey.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Today, I will keep working on the website and try to finish the feedback form. Also, I’d like to talk to Gabriel about the user interviews.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Today, I’ll be working on the first version of Frontity.org. I’ll create the first website wireframes and think about the questions we might include in the feedback form.

Read full topic

item.title: :white_check_mark: Frontity.org pre-launch - roadmap
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Yesterday I was working with @SantosGuillamot and @Reyes in a plan of what we need to achieve to release a first version of the Frontity.org site to the world

Feel free to edit this post when you finish something.

Roadmap

  • Web - frontity.org
    • - Prepare wireframes in Sketch.
    • - Write website copy.
    • - Choose Newsletter Saas.
    • - Prepare newsletter submission (two screens).
    • - Prepare extensive feedback survey (typeform).
    • - Turn wireframes into website layout.
    • - Configure footer pages.
    • - Configure analytics.
    • - Redirect frontity.com to frontity.org.
  • Forum
    • - Choose Single Sign On solution.
    • - Configure categories (names, descriptions and about topics).
    • - Define forum groups.
    • - Display the current objectives of each category.
    • - Create micro-updates threads for every team.
    • - Menu with links a frontity.org, GitHub and Twitter.
    • - Welcome message (which can be closed).
    • - Configure GDPR & cookies.
    • - Configure sign up (add checkbox GDPR and connect to newsletter).
    • - Create pages with legal stuff.
    • - Create forum analytics.
  • Frontity Blog
    • - Change blog.frontity.com domain to blog.frontity.org and redirect the URLs.
    • - Remove Sumo.
    • - Review all blog’s content and reorganize it.
    • - Configure blog Analytics.
  • Plugin
    • - Add a warning message at the top of the readme.txt and dashboard.
    • - Remove all links pointing to frontity.com (instademo, get-help…).
    • - Add UTM campaigns to all relevant links pointing to frontity.org.
    • - Update readme.txt on Github (commit).
    • - Upload new version of the old plugin (wp-pwa).
  • Extra
    • - Update Twitter profile.
    • - Update Linkedin profile.
    • - Move support.frontity.com to support.wp-pwa.com and redirect URLs.
    • - Delete business model from docs.

Read full topic
